subcodes.first_line: O My chosen one! Upon thee hath befallen that which befell Us. Render thou thanks and be thou among them that remember. Blessed art thou inasmuch as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا صفی قد ورد علیک ما ورد علینا ان اشکر و کن من الذاکرین طوبی لک بما
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment
